title: Randia altiscandens
taxonomy: Randia altiscandens is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. It is native to Central and South America, and its classification is further categorized as a member of the genus Randia. The plant is a part of the large and diverse family of Rubiaceae, which includes over 600 genera and more than 13,000 species. Randia altiscandens is a type of shrub or small tree, and its classification is closely related to other species within the same genus. Further research may be needed for a more detailed understanding of the plant's classification.
